verif_result.fix_hint: Simulation completed but values disagreed. max_error=128 across 32768 samples. See first_mismatch_* and expected/got for raw evidence.
verif_result.verilator_stderr: Simulation completed but values disagreed. max_error=128 across 32768 samples. See first_mismatch_* and expected/got for raw evidence.
verif_result.classifier_reason: Simulation completed with correct cycle count (32902 == 32902) and all 512 outputs received. The output values are almost entirely saturated at ±127/−128 (only 1 exact match out of 32768, mean_error=114.9), which is the INT8 saturation signature of a requantization scale bug — the accumulated MAC sum is being clipped before proper scaling, or the scale/shift constants are wrong (per-OC scale_factor present but may not be applied). This is the same class as the historical relu_rescale and stale scale.mem bugs in this project. No resource overflows, no bus-width violations, no toolchain errors. A retry with corrected requantization arithmetic can fix this.
